# (PART) Part III {-}

# Asset growth simulation {#simulation}

In the Shiny web application embedded below, you can freely tune your investment scenario and see how your asset will grow over time. Specifically, you can choose 6 parameters depending on the financial situation surrounding you:

1. Initial amount of investment in thousand USD
2. Investment amount per month
3. Increment of monthly investment per year
4. Your target profit
5. Annual inflation rate
6. Total duration of investment

```{r, fig.cap = "A simple Shiny app for asset growth simulation. The live version is available at https://junghoonshin.shinyapps.io/asset-growth-simulation/."}
include_app("https://junghoonshin.shinyapps.io/asset-growth-simulation/", height = "1000px")
```
